title: Our Science and Technology
description: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory addresses national and global issues by leveraging leading-edge science and technology (S&T). Learn more about our core areas of expertise.
text:
Moving the Mission Forward
Science and Technology on a Mission
Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) addresses national and global issues by leveraging leading-edge science and technology (S&T). To achieve world-class S&T, the Laboratory relies on a talented and committed staff, state-of-the-art facilities and equipment and robust partnerships with other laboratories, universities, industry and government organizations. These elements, along with internal investments in S&T, are indispensable to our national security missions and advancing science and technology.
Read Our Science and Technology Story
LLNL relies on the expertise of our talented and multidisciplinary workforce and unmatched facilities to ensure the Laboratory meets today’s mission and tomorrow’s challenges.
